case_title: MARIA GABRIELLA VISMARA CURRO VS. JOHN DOE AKA BUONENOVITA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DEFAMATION, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF VISMARA CURRO, MARIA GABRIELLA AS TO DEFENDANT JOHN DOE AKA BUONENOVITA DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-02-2015 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-10-2015
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER ISSUING SUBPOENA PRIOR TO SERVICE OF THE COMPLAINT; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES (TRANSACTION ID # 57095831) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VISMARA CURRO, MARIA GABRIELLA

DECLARATION OF JESSICA SHAFER IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFFS EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR AN ORDER ALLOWING PLAINTIFF TO ISSUE A SUBPOENA PRIOR TO SERVICE OF THE SUMMONS (TRANSACTION ID # 57095831) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VISMARA CURRO, MARIA GABRIELLA
ORDER (ISSUING SUBPOENA PRIOR TO SERVICE OF THE COMPLAINT)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF SEP-02-2015 CONTINUED TO OCT-14-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-24-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE OCT-14-2015 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 57999446)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-24-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
